---
title: Mixed-language coexistence test fixture
filters: [../_extensions/blendtutor/blendtutor.lua]
---

## Mixed-language coexistence test

### Exercise 1: R exercise

::: {.blendtutor language="r"}
Write a function `add(a, b)` that returns the sum.

```r
add <- function(a, b) { ___ }
```

```{.r .checks}
stopifnot(add(1, 2) == 3)
```
:::

### Exercise 2: Python exercise

::: {.blendtutor language="python"}
Print hello world.

```python
print("hello world")
```

```{.python .checks}
assert "hello" in "hello world"
```
:::
